message:
style(interactive): apply rustfmt formatting to TmuxWheelGuard and view module

Reformat multi-line argument arrays in TmuxWheelGuard::new and
restore_binding to single-line form, collapse multi-line boolean
conditions in mouse wheel handling, and condense the scroll indicator
format string — all purely cosmetic changes from rustfmt with no
behavioral impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
